name: slot-art-creator-node-mcp
description: Node.js MCP server for slot-art-creator — exposes five tools: nb2_generate, nb2_edit, nb2_upscale, nb2_smart_resize, and nb2_stage_image (copies external/chat-attached images into the safe inputs folder so they can be used by the others). Either Gemini or fal.ai works fully for the four generation/resize tools; with both keys set, the plugin routes generate/edit/upscale to Gemini (one fewer API hop, same NB2 model) and smart_resize to fal.ai (purpose-built NB Pro endpoint).
